attempted_route: nk.rsp_process(rsp_signal, sampling_rate=100) -> signals['RSP_Rate'] + info dict -> nk.rrv(rsp_rate, info, sampling_rate=100, show=False) per round-1 recommended_alternative; no deviations.
observation: AttributeError at line 29: module 'neurokit2' has no attribute 'rrv'. Error suggests using nk.hrv instead. exit_code=1 after 1.5s; no output produced.
rationale: nk.rsp_process() fix worked as intended, but nk.rrv() does not exist in the installed NeuroKit2 version. Round-1 NK correctly diagnosed the rsp_rate issue but assumed nk.rrv() exists; the installed version lacks it entirely.
recommended_alternative: After nk.rsp_process(), extract peaks from info['RSP_Peaks'] and RSP_Rate from signals. Compute RRV manually or via nk.hrv()-style wrappers: compute inter-breath intervals from peak indices (divided by sampling_rate), then call nk.hrv_time(), nk.hrv_frequency(), nk.hrv_nonlinear() on those intervals, save concatenated DataFrame to pred_results/rrv_analysis_pred.csv.
